session_summary: Loaded the prior project handoff, attempted the test suite, then focused on fixing installer failures and Joern integration regressions. The installer now reuses an existing .venv, keeps prompt UI out of command-substitution stdout, accepts full-word/letter/numeric runtime choices, removes interactsh installation, installs Joern directly from joern-cli.zip, shows progress around slow Joern steps, and verifies Joern with supported commands. A failing C# Joern integration test was fixed by treating ASP.NET Core minimal API lambda parameters as C# request sources.
key_topics: scripts/install.sh prompt and Joern install fixes
C# minimal API Joern source modeling

objective.primary: Fix installer failures around existing virtualenvs, runtime selection, interactsh, and Joern installation, then resolve the observed C# Joern test failure.
explicit_constraints: Allow runtime selection using a single character or 1, 2, or 3.
Clean up previous Joern install attempts and processes before retrying.
Write the conversation summary and push changes.
implicit_assumptions: The untracked ai-semantic-source-scanner.sln file is unrelated to the requested installer and Joern fixes.
The installer should prefer deterministic local verification over silently accepting a downloaded Joern tree.
Joern integration tests are allowed to run because Joern is now installed on the host.

outcome.summary: scripts/install.sh and ai_codescan/engines/joern_queries.sc were modified. Joern runner tests pass with 7 passed and 1 skipped. Full pytest was attempted earlier but was blocked by sandbox constraints around sockets, Docker, CodeQL network access, and read-only ~/.claude.
outcome.value_provenance: The installer handles the user's real install flow more predictably, and Joern C# coverage now detects the tiny ASP.NET fixture's CWE-89 flow.

files_modified.change_summary: Reuses existing .venv instead of unconditionally invoking uv venv; separates prompt UI from stdout; normalizes runtime choices including docker/d/1, podman/p/2, none/n/3; removes interactsh installation; replaces upstream Joern installer call with direct joern-cli.zip download/extract/link flow; adds Joern progress messages; supports AICS_JOERN_DIR, AICS_JOERN_LINK_DIR, AICS_JOERN_VERSION, and AICS_REINSTALL_JOERN; bounds informational version probes; verifies Joern using joern --help and joern-parse --list-languages.
Adds C# minimal API lambda parameters as Joern source candidates so tiny-aspnet's id parameter can be paired with ExecuteReader in the fallback path.
Manual conversation summary for cross-agent context handoff.

commands_executed.purpose: Run the project test suite via the Makefile's intended command.
Retry tests with a writable uv cache.
Mirror the read-only uv cache to a writable location for offline testing.
Retry pytest offline from copied cache.
Run the full suite from the existing local virtualenv.
Exercise existing .venv reuse, runtime choice normalization, Joern direct install, progress messages, reinstall path, and verification without downloading large artifacts.
Verify the actual installed Joern CLI supports these startup probes.
Reproduce and verify the C# Joern integration failure.
Run all Joern runner integration tests after the C# source modeling fix.

external_resources.purpose: Checked Joern installer/release behavior and confirmed direct joern-cli.zip install approach.

decisions.decision: Reuse an existing .venv instead of invoking uv venv unconditionally.
decisions.rationale: uv prompts to replace an existing .venv, and choosing no exits nonzero under set -e; uv sync can reconcile an existing environment.
alternatives_rejected: Keep relying on uv's interactive replacement prompt

decisions.decision: Make ask_choice write UI to stderr and return only the selected value on stdout.
decisions.rationale: The runtime prompt was used inside command substitution, so prompt text leaked into RUNTIME and produced a Python SyntaxError when writing config.
alternatives_rejected: Avoid command substitution at the call site only
Quote the Python heredoc more defensively while leaving mixed stdout

decisions.rationale: The user explicitly requested its removal from the install flow.
alternatives_rejected: Only hide the prompt in noninteractive mode

decisions.decision: Install Joern by directly downloading joern-cli.zip rather than running joern-install.sh with --version=latest.
decisions.rationale: The prior flow downloaded a 9-byte invalid zip because the upstream installer treated latest as a literal release tag path.
alternatives_rejected: Require the user to install Joern manually

decisions.decision: Verify Joern with joern --help and joern-parse --list-languages instead of joern --version.
decisions.rationale: The installed Joern CLI reports 'Warning: Unknown option --version'; help and list-languages are supported and validate startup/parser availability.
alternatives_rejected: Accept unknown-option output as proof of installation

decisions.decision: Model C# minimal API lambda parameters as Joern source candidates.
decisions.rationale: Joern's C# frontend exposes minimal API request parameters as lambda parameter nodes, not Request.Query/FromQuery reads, and the data-flow engine did not connect ExecuteReader through SqliteCommand receiver state.
alternatives_rejected: Mark the C# Joern test xfail
Broaden C# source regex to every identifier
Change the fixture to explicit Request.Query access

knowledge_acquired.fact: When .venv exists and the user declines replacement, uv venv exits nonzero and aborts install.sh under set -e.
Printing prompt text to stdout from ask_choice contaminates variables assigned with command substitution.
The direct latest asset URL for Joern is https://github.com/joernio/joern/releases/latest/download/joern-cli.zip.
Current Joern supports joern --help and joern-parse --list-languages, while joern --version emits 'Warning: Unknown option --version'.

For tests/fixtures/tiny-aspnet/Program.cs, Joern exposes the minimal API id parameter as id:System.String on line 14, ExecuteReader as a call on line 19 with receiver argument cmd, and SqliteCommand constructor argument sql on line 18.

errors_encountered.error: uv could not create temporary files in /home/robin/.cache/uv because the cache was read-only in the sandbox.
errors_encountered.resolution: Retried with UV_CACHE_DIR under /tmp, then discovered missing network/cache dependencies.

errors_encountered.error: uv offline/cache attempts missed semgrep==1.162.0 and duckdb==1.5.2 wheels.
errors_encountered.context: Trying to run tests without network access.

errors_encountered.error: Full pytest run failed on environment constraints: socket PermissionError, Docker socket permission denied, CodeQL pack download DNS failure, and ~/.claude read-only.
errors_encountered.resolution: Scoped verification to installer harnesses and Joern runner tests.

errors_encountered.error: Installer wrote an unterminated Python string for container_runtime.
errors_encountered.context: ask_choice prompt text was captured into RUNTIME.
errors_encountered.resolution: Moved prompt output to stderr and made ask_choice return only the normalized choice on stdout.

errors_encountered.error: Joern installer downloaded a 9-byte invalid zip.
errors_encountered.resolution: Replaced with direct joern-cli.zip download, zip validation, extraction, symlink creation, and startup checks.

errors_encountered.error: Joern status check printed 'Warning: Unknown option --version'.
errors_encountered.context: Installer used joern --version as an installed/probe command.
errors_encountered.resolution: Changed probes to joern --help and joern-parse --list-languages.

errors_encountered.context: Joern C# query source modeling omitted minimal API lambda parameters.
errors_encountered.resolution: Added C# parameter nodes as source candidates and verified the Joern runner suite.

The user's request to push changes is pending at the moment this handoff was written.
blockers: The sandbox cannot push to GitHub if outbound SSH/network is unavailable; the push result is not known at handoff write time.

interaction_dynamics.roles_and_personas: User is a technical project owner actively running the installer and tests in their real shell. Assistant acted as coding/debugging agent, patching local files and verifying with targeted commands.

tone_fragments.notes: User loaded prior context and asked for tests; assistant reported sandbox constraints.
User pasted live installer failures; assistant patched install.sh in response.
User challenged whether timeout probes were sufficient; assistant adjusted toward functional verification.
User reported a Joern C# integration failure; assistant reproduced, inspected the CPG, patched query logic, and verified tests.

drift_or_contradictions: The session began with broad test-suite verification but shifted to installer bug fixes as the user encountered failures during install.
A timeout-based Joern version check was initially added, then replaced after user pushback with functional Joern startup and parser checks.
interaction_dynamics.annotation_notes: The user prefers direct fixes and challenges weak validation. No sarcasm detected.

user_signals.communication_style: terse, technical, corrective when validation is weak
preferences_observed: Wants real functional verification rather than superficial command-existence checks.
Wants installer output to explain long-running phases.
Prefers removing unneeded install steps over keeping optional prompts.
Expects the assistant to commit/push when asked.
feedback_given: Asked to review the script for similar prompt/stdout issues.
Asked to remove interactsh from install.
Questioned whether timeout-based Joern checks were really the best way.
Asked to write the conversation summary and push changes.

prompting_strategies.techniques_observed: The user provided concrete terminal output as failure evidence and used direct correction to steer verification quality.
micro_prompts_used: Paste failing command output and ask for the specific script fix.
Challenge a validation strategy and ask to clean up state before retrying.
Ask to summarize and push once the work is complete.
prompting_strategies.model_adaptations: Assistant moved from broad test execution to targeted reproductions, fake harnesses, real Joern probes, and CPG inspection.

context_artifacts.tool_notes: The sandbox restricts network and some home-directory writes. Direct rm -rf was blocked by policy once; moving files was used instead. A cleanup attempt initially failed because PATH was effectively broken, so absolute paths to coreutils were used.

handoff.context_brief: The session fixed installer issues and a Joern C# integration gap in /home/robin/git/Private/ai-semantic-source-scanner. scripts/install.sh now reuses existing .venv, normalizes runtime prompts, removes interactsh, installs Joern directly from joern-cli.zip with progress and verification, and uses supported Joern probes. ai_codescan/engines/joern_queries.sc now includes C# minimal API lambda parameters as source candidates. The Joern runner suite passes with 7 passed and 1 skipped. At handoff write time, the branch is dev tracking origin/dev with these changes and .context-handoff.json modified; ai-semantic-source-scanner.sln remains untracked and unrelated.
what_next_session_should_know: The full test suite is not clean in the sandbox because of environmental constraints; targeted Joern tests pass.
Joern does not support --version in the installed CLI; use --help and joern-parse --list-languages for startup checks.
AICS_REINSTALL_JOERN=yes forces the installer through the real Joern install path even when a stale joern is on PATH.
The C# Joern fix relies on minimal API request parameters appearing as lambda parameter nodes.
The untracked ai-semantic-source-scanner.sln file was not modified by the assistant.
